title: Stablecoin issuer and redemption status manual gate
blocking_rule: Only pass allows fixture alert review; fail or unknown must keep the strategy blocked and must not produce automated buy instructions.

required_checks.question: Has the issuer published no active reserve, redemption, freeze or solvency warning for this asset during the review window?
required_evidence: issuer status page or official announcement URL
fail_if: issuer or regulator reports asset freeze or enforcement action

required_checks.question: Are primary redemption or conversion channels available for normal eligible users during the review window?
required_evidence: issuer redemption documentation or status URL
fail_if: redemption minimums, delays or eligibility rules make the path unusable for the intended notional

required_checks.question: Does the target exchange show deposits, withdrawals and spot trading as available for the asset?
required_evidence: exchange asset status URL or screenshot reference
fail_if: spot trading is suspended or in reduce-only mode

required_checks.question: Is the observed discount not solely a single-venue bad print or isolated stale quote?
required_evidence: prices from at least two priority exchanges when available
fail_if: only one venue shows the discount and its orderbook is stale
best bid/ask depth is too thin for the intended notional

required_checks.question: Does the candidate remain spot-only, low-notional, manually confirmed and within the operator profile?
fail_if: requires continuous manual monitoring beyond the planned review window

output_contract.evidence_urls: array of official or exchange URLs
